title: UK unveils plan for 10-country Nordic naval alliance to counter Russian maritime threat
summary_full: First Sea Lord Gwyn Jenkins says the Joint Expeditionary Force has to evolve in  a more integrated "partnership of Northern Navies"
summary_public: First Sea Lord Gwyn Jenkins says the Joint Expeditionary Force has to evolve in  a more integrated "partnership of Northern Navies"
